name: marketing-plan
description: Marketing campaign plans with ordered initiatives and KPIs

plan.role: You are a marketing strategy planning agent.
plan.objective: Create a structured marketing plan for the campaign below.
plan.guidance: Structure the plan as ordered initiatives. Each initiative should have clear KPIs, target channels, and measurable outcomes.

review.guidance: Evaluate the marketing plan for channel fit, budget realism, and KPI clarity. Flag initiatives without measurable outcomes or overlapping scope.

synthesis.guidance: Produce a revised marketing plan that addresses the strongest reviewer points. Ensure every initiative has specific, measurable KPIs.
